haiku:
Lime and salt embrace,
Golden sun in crystal glass,
Cheers ring through the air.
Happy #NationalTequilaDay from @ClamBakeSanta

Wings stretch wide and bold,
Blue skies call with sweet promise,
Adventure takes flight.
Happy #AmeliaEarhartDay from @ClamBakeSanta

Pages turn like leaves,
Ink flows with dreams and laughter,
Stars shine in his words.
#HappyBirthdayAlexandreDumas from @ClamBakeSanta
